# WP Appointments Help Center

> User guides and tutorials for WP Appointments — the next-gen appointment scheduling plugin for WordPress.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://wpappointments.com/help/getting-started/): Install and activate the plugin, run the setup wizard

## Appointments

- [Creating Appointments](https://wpappointments.com/help/appointments/creating/): Book appointments from the admin calendar
- [Managing Appointments](https://wpappointments.com/help/appointments/managing/): View, edit, cancel, and confirm appointments

## Bookables

- [Bookable Types](https://wpappointments.com/help/bookables/types/): Understand the bookable type system
- [Entities](https://wpappointments.com/help/bookables/entities/): Manage bookable resources (people, rooms, equipment)
- [Variants](https://wpappointments.com/help/bookables/variants/): Service variants and pricing

## Availability

- [Schedules](https://wpappointments.com/help/availability/schedules/): Set weekly availability schedules
- [Layers](https://wpappointments.com/help/availability/layers/): Override rules, holidays, and exceptions

## Customers

- [Managing Customers](https://wpappointments.com/help/customers/managing/): View and manage customer records

## Booking Flow

- [Gutenberg Block](https://wpappointments.com/help/booking-flow/gutenberg-block/): Embed the booking form on any page

## Notifications

- [Email Notifications](https://wpappointments.com/help/notifications/email/): Confirmation, update, and cancellation emails

## Settings

- [General Settings](https://wpappointments.com/help/settings/general/): Plugin-wide configuration options

## Related

- [Developer Documentation](https://docs.wpappointments.com): REST API, hooks, addon development
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/wpappointments/wpappointments): Source code and issues
